nodes.name: flutter-build.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for building and fixing Flutter applications, covering diagnostic commands, iterative error-fix loops, common Flutter build errors, and stop conditions for agentic sessions.

nodes.name: flutter-review.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for conducting Flutter code reviews, specifying review areas such as widget structure, state management, and performance, with approval criteria and example sessions.

nodes.name: flutter-test.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for running Flutter test suites, covering unit, widget, and integration test commands, common test failure patterns, and example agentic sessions.

nodes.name: gan-build.md
nodes.summary: Slash command implementing a GAN-style (Generative Adversarial Network-inspired) multi-agent build harness where a Planner sets goals, a Generator produces code, and an Evaluator critiques quality in iterative loops.
nodes.languageNotes: Applies adversarial machine-learning metaphor (generator/evaluator loop) to agentic code generation workflows.

nodes.name: gan-design.md
nodes.summary: Slash command for a GAN-style design harness, adapting the generator-evaluator loop for UI/UX design artifacts with a design-specific evaluation rubric distinct from code builds.

nodes.name: go-build.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for building and fixing Go applications, providing diagnostic commands, iterative error-count-driven fix loops, common Go compiler errors, and stop conditions.

nodes.name: go-review.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for Go code reviews, categorizing findings as CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM severity, running automated checks (go vet, staticcheck), and specifying approval criteria.

nodes.name: go-test.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for Go test-driven development, covering the full TDD red-green-refactor cycle, table-driven tests, parallel tests, coverage targets, and example agentic sessions.

nodes.name: gradle-build.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for fixing Gradle build failures, including configuration detection, error parsing/grouping, iterative fix loops with guardrails, and common Kotlin Multiplatform fixes.

nodes.name: harness-audit.md
nodes.summary: Slash command for auditing the ECC harness configuration, running deterministic checks on plugin structure, rules, hooks, and output contracts, with a structured checklist and example results.

nodes.name: hookify-configure.md
nodes.summary: Minimal slash command for configuring ECC hook rules, providing a short step-by-step workflow for updating hook configuration files.

nodes.name: hookify-help.md
nodes.summary: Slash command reference for the ECC hook system, explaining event types, rule file format, available hookify sub-commands, and pattern tips for users.

nodes.name: hookify-list.md
nodes.summary: Minimal slash command for listing currently configured ECC hook rules, providing a short step-by-step workflow to enumerate active hooks.

nodes.name: hookify.md
nodes.summary: Primary slash command for the ECC hookify system, guiding the agent through gathering behavior information, presenting findings, generating rule files, and confirming the hook configuration with the user.

nodes.name: instinct-export.md
nodes.summary: Slash command for exporting learned ECC instinct patterns to a portable file format, specifying the output schema and available export flags.

nodes.name: instinct-import.md
nodes.summary: Slash command for importing ECC instinct patterns from external files, detailing the import process, merge behavior for conflicts, source tracking, and available flags.

nodes.name: instinct-status.md
nodes.summary: Slash command for displaying the current status of the ECC instinct system, showing learned patterns, their last-used timestamps, and confidence scores.

nodes.name: jira.md
nodes.summary: Slash command for Jira integration, enabling ticket retrieval, comment posting, status transitions, and JQL-based search from within Claude Code sessions, with prerequisite setup instructions.

nodes.name: kotlin-build.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for building and fixing Kotlin applications, with error-count-driven fix loops, Kotlin-specific compiler error patterns, and stop conditions for agentic sessions.

nodes.name: kotlin-review.md
nodes.summary: Slash command guide for Kotlin code reviews, categorizing findings by CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM severity, running automated checks (ktlint, detekt), and providing approval criteria with example sessions.
